doc_title_en: (Corrected) Notice regarding acquisition and self-tender offer of treasury shares, disposal of treasury shares via third-party allotment, capital and business partnership with Kobe Bussan, and changes to principal shareholders and related parties
doc_title_jp: （訂正）自己株式に係る取得及び公開買付け、第三者割当による自己株式の処分、神戸物産との資本業務提携、主要株主である筆頭株主・その他の関係会社の異動

key_facts.reason_jp: 資本業務提携、主要株主異動

summary_en: Corrected disclosure. Issuer to conduct acquisition and self-tender offer of own shares; dispose of treasury shares via third-party allotment; enter capital and business partnership with Kobe Bussan (currently holds 0.06% of Kobe Bussan; existing license and supply relationships). Specific share count, yen limit, and execution window not disclosed in excerpt.
summary_jp: 訂正版。自社株取得・公開買付け実施予定；第三者割当で自己株式処分；神戸物産と資本業務提携（現保有率0.06%）。具体的な株数・金額・期間は記載箇所未掲載。
tag_en: Buyback - size not disclosed - self-tender + third-party allotment disposal + capital partnership with Kobe Bussan
tag_jp: 自己株式取得・公開買付け + 第三者割当処分 + 神戸物産との資本業務提携

doc_title_en: Notice regarding acquisition of treasury shares and public tender offer, disposition of treasury shares by third-party allotment, capital and business alliance with Kobebutsusan, and changes in principal shareholders
doc_title_jp: 自己株式に係る取得及び公開買付け、第三者割当による自己株式の処分、神戸物産との資本業務提携、主要株主である筆頭株主・その他の関係会社の異動

key_facts.reason_jp: マキリによる売却意向（2024年5月下旬）を契機；EPS、ROE等の資本効率向上と株主還元に寄与

summary_en: 4,343,800 shares (43.42% of shares outstanding) via self-tender offer; price ceiling not yet disclosed; concurrent third-party allotment of treasury shares to Kobebutsusan (TSE Prime listed); Makiri (founder family asset manager, current 43.42% holder) triggered sale intent May 2024; transaction expected to shift control from Makiri to Kobebutsusan; period start June 2026 (planned).
summary_jp: 自己株式4,343,800株（発行済株式43.42%）を公開買付で取得予定；買付価格上限未発表；同時に神戸物産（東証プライム上場）への第三者割当を実施；マキリ（創業者一族資産管理会社、現在の筆頭株主）の売却意向を契機（2024年5月下旬）；支配権がマキリから神戸物産へ移行予定。
tag_en: Buyback + third-party allotment - 4,343,800 shares (43.42% S/O) - Kobebutsusan partnership
tag_jp: 自己株式取得・公開買付 + 神戸物産への第三者割当 - 4,343,800株（43.42%）
